title: Create: Ornithopter Glider
description: A simple create addon to add an Ornithopter Glider.
body: #### _Made in Brasil_ ![Brazil flag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c5f477e1655471df04174516f88081286146a7.png) ![Banner of mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/665f041a8a2b95b22f8a57282e1e36f1543ee9a0_0.webp) # About Ornithopter Glider is a custom glider mod that brings a fresh twist to flight. Inspired by Da Vinci’s flying machines, this beautifully crafted wing set lets you soar through the world with custom animations, sound effects, and full support for the Curios back slot. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or diving into danger, the Ornithopter makes every flight feel epic. # Preview ![Preview](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcXppMHAxMW05MjdpeHVmZDR4cG55MXB4ZDhpdDNlMGZvc3psOWcxOCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/7Mt4GmaLtJyyVpbXl5/giphy.gif) [![Watch the video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/EBTCV4SWYAk/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://youtu.be/EBTCV4SWYAk?start=718&hl=en&cc_lang_pref=en&cc_load_policy=1) # How to use By pressing the assigned key (Space by default) you can charge a bar and "flap your wings" to create a boost. This boost has a 2 second cooldown. ![Boost bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28a2ff0805e5bbdde15efadf76b908719d1c7b8.png) # Crafting The Ornithopter Glider can only be crafted using the Mechanical Crafter from the Create mod. ![Crafting meshe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e702784c480242452853f53948adad2835e62d8c.png) ![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a64f4dbb1c0a39aa4cca3c98f643b04f491f6f14.png) # Required Dependencies This mod requires a few other mods to work properly. Make sure you have the following installed for full functionality: - [⚙️ Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) # Optional Dependencies The mods below are fully compatible: - [✨ Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) or ([🎩 Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) + [Curios Compat Layer](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-cc-layer) ) # Try with this This mod can be even more awesome if you use it together with: - [🌍 Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - [🛢️ Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)
